title: Make `buildah build --label foo` create an empty "foo" label again
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Restore podman's CLI compatibility with `docker build` by making its `--label` and `--annotate` options set empty labels and annotations when they're given a name but no `=` or value.

#### How to verify it

Updated integration test!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Test failures in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/14118, h/t @flouthoc.

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
